display.purpose: Hero headlines only. 'Cada llama, una historia.' Never for anything below H1 level.

headline.purpose: Section headings, product detail names. Still in the serif; still with presence.

title.purpose: Subsection titles, large UI labels, product card names on statement cards.

body.purpose: Product descriptions, marketing copy, long-form prose. 65-75ch max width.

label.purpose: CTAs, navigation links, variant labels, prices. Used sparingly — not on every section.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Product and catalog cards on :hover only. Warm-dark diffuse glow.

shadows.name: header-solid
shadows.purpose: Site header bottom hairline in solid state (scrolled, non-hero pages).

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Header transitions, featured link arrow. Strong ease-out for state changes.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Button hover, card hover, image scale. Standard interactive feedback.

motion.name: dur-fast
motion.purpose: Hover states, focus rings, opacity toggles.

motion.name: gsap-entrance
motion.value: gsap.fromTo(targets, { y: 14-22, autoAlpha: 0 }, { y: 0, autoAlpha: 1, stagger: 0.035-0.1, duration: 0.55-0.8, ease: 'power3.out' })
motion.purpose: Page/section entrance via gsap.context(fn, containerRef) + .revert() cleanup. Check prefers-reduced-motion before running.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Single-column grid; statement card collapses to 1 col

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: PDP: single column; catalog: 3-col + full-width statement

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: Deep sienna fill, near-white uppercase label, main purchase and navigation CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Barlow', system-ui, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.99 0.000 0); background-color: oklch(0.46 0.16 42); border: none; border-radius: 2px; padding: 1rem 2rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: oklch(0.54 0.16 42); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.46 0.16 42); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Outline ink, transparent fill. Load more, secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Barlow', system-ui, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.20 0.025 52); background-color: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(0.20 0.025 52); border-radius: 2px; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: oklch(0.20 0.025 52); color: oklch(0.94 0.010 72); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.20 0.025 52); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Image-forward catalog card. Portrait 3:4 image, name + desc + price + swatches below.
components.html:
Vela Ámbar

Aroma cálido, cera natural de soja, mecha de algodón.

24,90 €
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; background-color: oklch(0.94 0.018 76); border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 8px 28px oklch(0.20 0.025 52 / 0.09); } .ds-card__image { aspect-ratio: 3 / 4; overflow: hidden; background-color: oklch(0.88 0.030 76); } .ds-card__placeholder { width: 100%; height: 100%; } .ds-card__info { padding: 1rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; flex: 1; } .ds-card__name { font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.015em; line-height: 1.2; color: oklch(0.20 0.025 52); margin: 0; } .ds-card__desc { font-family: 'Barlow', system-ui, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.55; color: oklch(0.46 0.018 52); margin: 0; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card__footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.75rem; margin-top: auto; padding-top: 0.5rem; } .ds-card__price { font-family: 'Barlow', system-ui, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.20 0.025 52); } .ds-card__swatches { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-card__swatch { display: block; width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid oklch(0.20 0.025 52 / 0.12); }

components.name: Site Navigation (Solid)
components.description: Fixed 60px header in solid state (non-hero pages). Logo in Libre Baskerville; Barlow nav links.
components.html:
Casa Tierra Luz
Colección Acceder
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 60px; padding: 0 2rem; background-color: oklch(0.99 0.000 0); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 oklch(0.20 0.025 52 / 0.08); } .ds-nav__logo { font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; text-decoration: none; color: oklch(0.20 0.025 52); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-nav__links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; } .ds-nav__link { font-family: 'Barlow', system-ui, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; color: oklch(0.20 0.025 52); letter-spacing: 0.02em; transition: opacity 180ms; } .ds-nav__link:hover { opacity: 0.65; } .ds-nav__link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.46 0.16 42); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Variant Selector Row
components.description: Product detail page variant button. Color swatch + label + availability + price in one row.
components.css: .ds-variant { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; background-color: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(0.84 0.010 75); border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Barlow', system-ui, Arial, sans-serif; text-align: left; transition: border-color 180ms, background-color 180ms; } .ds-variant:hover { border-color: oklch(0.20 0.025 52); background-color: oklch(0.94 0.018 76); } .ds-variant[aria-pressed='true'] { border-color: oklch(0.20 0.025 52); border-width: 2px; background-color: oklch(0.94 0.018 76); } .ds-variant:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-variant__swatch { width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; border: 1px solid oklch(0.20 0.025 52 / 0.12); } .ds-variant__info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-variant__name { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.20 0.025 52); display: block; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-variant__avail { font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.46 0.018 52); display: block; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-variant__price { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.20 0.025 52); white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-variant:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.46 0.16 42); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
The design lives in a specific warmth — el interior encendido, the lit interior. The moment when candles have been placed and lit, the world outside cools to dusk, and the room fills with something you made with your hands. Casa Tierra Luz is exactly this: warmth that is earned, not automatic. Crafted, not generated.

The palette is the room itself. --c-primary is warm sand — walls, linen, the surfaces where things rest. --c-accent is deep sienna — the clay of the holder, the earth the wax comes from, the burning material. Background is neutral white: the clean surface a candle sits on before it's lit.

Motion is choreographed and unhurried: GSAP power3.out ease, scroll-triggered stagger, sections arriving with intention rather than energy. Design reference: mawastudio.es — refined craft studio aesthetic, elevated without distance. Clean, warm, airy — the product is the hero, the interface is the frame.
keyCharacteristics: Warm sand (--c-primary) as brand section surfaces — hero, story sections; light, not dark
Single deep sienna accent (--c-accent) used on ≤2 interactive elements per screen — CTAs and prices
Neutral white (--c-bg) for product areas — the canvas that lets product photography breathe
Libre Baskerville 700 serif for all display and headline text
Barlow for body, labels, and interactive copy
Near-flat elevation: surfaces rest without shadow; only hover states lift
GSAP choreography with gsap.context + .revert() cleanup; prefers-reduced-motion respected

rules.name: The Light Primary Rule
rules.body: Warm sand is the brand surface, not a dark hero. Hero, story sections, and catalog masthead carry --c-primary as background. Text on these surfaces uses --c-ink, not --c-on-primary. --c-on-primary is reserved for text on the dark footer only.

rules.name: The One Flame Rule
rules.body: Sienna appears on ≤2 interactive elements per screen. A CTA and a price. Never for borders, never for section decoration. Rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Chroma-Zero Background Rule
rules.body: The product canvas (--c-bg) has chroma 0. No warm tint, no cream. Warmth is carried by the sand–sienna relationship in brand sections, not by tinting the neutral. Any color toward oklch(L 0.84-0.97, C < 0.06, hue 40-100) on the product canvas is the AI cream default — prohibited.

rules.name: The Weight Gravity Rule
rules.body: Libre Baskerville 700 at display size should feel heavy against body text. The contrast between a serif headline and Barlow body is the visual rhythm of every page. A flat scale is a design error.

rules.name: The Serif Ownership Rule
rules.body: Libre Baskerville owns display, headline, and title. Barlow owns body and label. No Barlow headlines; no Baskerville body copy.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces have no resting shadow. A surface with a permanent drop shadow is a design error. Shadows are feedback (hover, active), never structure.

dos: Use warm sand (oklch(0.88 0.030 76)) as the brand surface on hero, story, and catalog masthead sections — light and airy, not dark
Use --c-ink for all text on warm sand / primary surfaces; --c-on-primary is for dark footer text only
Use Libre Baskerville for all display and headline text
Let product photography breathe on --c-bg surfaces with generous padding
Keep deep sienna to ≤2 interactive elements per screen — CTA and price
Use gsap.context(fn, containerRef) with .revert() cleanup for all GSAP entrance animations
Apply text-wrap: balance on h1–h3; text-wrap: pretty on long prose
Include @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) and JS matchMedia check for every animation
Verify body text contrast: --c-muted on --c-bg ≥5:1 ✓; --c-ink on --c-bg ≥14:1 ✓; --c-ink on --c-primary ≥7:1 ✓
Reference mawastudio.es as the primary visual tone anchor
donts: Use any warm-neutral near-white as the body background (oklch L 0.84–0.97, C < 0.06, hue 40–100) — the AI cream default
Put --c-on-primary (warm near-white) on warm sand surfaces — it fails contrast; --c-on-primary is for --c-footer dark surfaces only
Build identical card grids (same dimensions, icon + name + price, no variation)
Use cold studio minimalism or Etsy/Shopify template structure
Use boho Instagram visual vocabulary: terracotta dominant, macramé textures, dried-flower ornaments
Apply background-clip: text with a gradient — solid ink only
Use border-left or border-right > 1px as a colored accent stripe
Add uppercase tracked kicker labels above every section heading
Animate CSS layout properties (width, height, padding, top/left) — transforms and opacity only
Ship an entrance animation without a prefers-reduced-motion alternative
Use any font from the reflex-reject list: Fraunces, Newsreader, Lora, Cormorant, DM Sans, Outfit, Instrument Serif, Space Grotesk, Inter
